channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: White Transit Abandoned in Nurstead Road., 6th June
item.description:
A old White transit van registration BJ20 VSM has been abandoned in Nurstead Road for over 2 weeks. Children have been trying to break into the van. Plus other vans have been turning up trying to remove parts.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nurstead Road, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bottom of Kingsley Road outside house that did kt, 6th June
item.description:
Rubbish dumped by house where rubbish. See gate in photo

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsley Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Unstable young tree, 6th June
item.description:
Robe has snapped to keep the young tree stable.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Havelock Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 27 to 31 boevey path, 6th June
item.description:
Reported a few days ago and yesterday it was marked as complete. This is not true a large branch has been removed only (see photos). The path from No 27 to 29 is a mess and dogs fouling reported at same time is also all still there this is a big issue to no 27 as she uses a mobility scooter.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Boevey Path, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3D Osborne Rd, London E9 5NH this Muslim resident is renting two bay on driveway out to members of public for renter 20 pound for four hours parking. This is causing upset and disturbance in the area because are coming and going all hours like a busy car park. Authority please address this annoyance., 6th June
item.description:
Resident is parking car on kerb causing highway obstruction to members of public and pedestrian.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Semley Gate, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking my entry and exit to property, 6th June
item.description:
This car has been parked all day today and I cannot easily get my car out and cars cannot come into my house. Private property as I live at 6 wood drive

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wood Drive, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress dumped, 6th June
item.description:
Cardbourd boxes old flooring and one mattress all dumped in bullace row se5 7hj
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bullace Row, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Heavy tree branch has fallen., 6th June
item.description:
Heavy tree branch has fallen off and hit and dented a car and blocking the foot path causing people to walk along the road. This is directly opposite number 25,27,29 Cobourg Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cobourg Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned refrigerator and loose refuse, 6th June
item.description:
Commercial drinks fridge is abandoned on the street along with a ton of loose rubbish. Attracting vermin.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beaufoy Road, Clapham Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A burnt out scooter that’s been there for a week, 6th June
item.description:
It’s a health hazard as children play in front of the house where the burnt out scooter is located It’s located in the parking bay immediately outside 15 Avenue Road, Penge SE20

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Avenue Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on public facing wall, 6th June
item.description:
Please cover up
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Kent Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Construction Site Hoarding covered in graffiti tags, 6th June
item.description:
Please cover all the graffiti tags on the boardings
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Commercial Way, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Graffiti on telephone box, 6th June
item.description:
Please cover/remove the tagging
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Commercial Way, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bricks broken on ramp at slade cafe, 6th June
item.description:
Broken bricks on pathway/ramp at Slade cafe. Near entrance at Garland road. Thank you for your help.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead Common Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 6th June
item.description:
Lots of beer cans

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Charter Drive, Albany Park, Greater London

item.title: Many bags of rubbish, 6th June
item.description:
Many bags of rubbish dumped all along admiral Street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Admiral Street, Deptford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside front door of 1 Rochester Terrace (which is on Wilmot Place), 6th June
item.description:
The signpost has alarmingly rusted all the way through and will very easily now snap and fall. I am not being alarmist about this.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Rochester Terrace, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road drain not draining water causing big puddle, 6th June
item.description:
Road drain not draining water causing big puddle causing water to splash onto the pavement, driveway and passing pedestrians when car pass in either direction.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 69, Kent Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overcrowded Lime hire bikes left abandoned blocking the pavement and road dangerously, 6th June
item.description:
Overcrowded Lime hire bikes left abandoned blocking the pavement and road dangerously as shown in picture. Might hurt somebody. Opposite Hippodrome casino at Little Newport Street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Newport Place, Chinatown, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 6th June
item.description:
Rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sutherland Square, Walworth, Greater London
